description: sandals from fila are made with fine fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. These Shelby floaters from fila for women are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The synthetic upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. The colour happy tone is sure to life your spirits during the monsoon. Wear these with your off-duty essentials.UpperSynthetic upper in an attractive design with forefoot, collar and ankle straps, complete with Velcro fasteners for a snug FitFloral stitch detailing on the strapsCushioned lining for greater comfort on the ankle strap and collarAppliqué d logo on the strapsCushioned footbed with textured pattern for soft massage feel and all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for durabilityCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortSandal careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
